detaileddescription.para: Cached Group Information created by CreateGroup()
Cached Results for FindGroups()
Cached Results for GetCachedFindGroupsByGroupIds()
Cached Results for QueryGroupRoster()
Cached Results for QueryGroupInvites()
Cached Results for QueryGroupRequests()
Critical sections for thread safe operation for modifying CachedCurrentGroup
Critical sections for thread safe operation for modifying CachedGroupResults
Critical sections for thread safe operation for modifying CachedGroupListByGroupIdsResults
Critical sections for thread safe operation for modifying CachedMembersByGroupIdResults
Critical sections for thread safe operation for modifying CachedGroupInviteResults
Critical sections for thread safe operation for modifying CachedGroupRequests
Instance of the subsystem that created this interface

memberdef.argsstring: (const IOnlineSubsystem *Subsystem, TSharedPtr< FOnlineGroupsAccelByte, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > &OutInterfaceInstance)
memberdef.name: GetFromSubsystem

detaileddescription.para: Convenience method to get an instance of this interface from the subsystem passed in.

Subsystem
Subsystem instance that we wish to get this interface from
OutInterfaceInstance
Instance of the interface that we got from the subsystem, or nullptr if not found
boolean that is true if we could get an instance of the interface, false otherwise
End FAccelByteGroupsInfo Begin FOnlineGroupsAccelByte

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &UserIdCreatingGroup, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: CreateGroup

detaileddescription.para: Used for creating a group for the first time

parameterdescription.para: - User Id that is creating the group. This user automatically becomes the Group Admin.
- Initial group information supplied to create the group.
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &SearchingUserId, const FAccelByteModelsGetGroupListRequest &RequestedContent, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: FindGroups

detaileddescription.para: Finds a number of previously created Groups to be found given the provided content

parameterdescription.para: - UserId requesting the search
- Content the user is requesting from the search
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method.

detaileddescription.para: This method returns a cache of data generated by the 'FindGroups' method
This method returns a cache of data generated by the 'FindGroupsByGroupIds' method

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &SearchingUserId, const TArray< FString > GroupIds, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: FindGroupsByGroupIds

detaileddescription.para: Finds a number of previously created Groups to be found by X number of Group IDs

parameterdescription.para: - UserId requesting the search
- Array of Group IDs to find
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &CurrentUserId, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: QueryGroupInfo

detaileddescription.para: Gets up to date FAccelByteModelsGroupInformation for the provided group information. Use GetDisplayInfo() to retrieve queried data.

parameterdescription.para: - User ID requesting the group information
- Group information to query
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

detaileddescription.para: After calling 'CreateGroup' this method can be used to retrieve the cached data of the group

simplesect.para: FAccelByteGroupsInfoPtr - Complete data cache of the recently created group called 'CurrentGroup'

memberdef.argsstring: (const FAccelByteGroupsInfoRef &InGroupInfo)
memberdef.name: SetCachedGroupInfo

detaileddescription.para: Used by 'CreateGroup' to set the cached 'CurrentGroup' data. Used to cache local data, but does not change server data.

parameterdescription.para: - Incoming data to overwrite the existing data cache

detaileddescription.para: Used by 'DeleteGroup' to not only delete server data, but also locally cached 'CurrentGroup' data.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &UserIdJoiningGroup, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: JoinGroup

detaileddescription.para: Used by a non-Group user to request to join the current group

parameterdescription.para: - User ID requesting to join the group
- Group the user is requesting to join
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &UserIdLeavingGroup, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: LeaveGroup

detaileddescription.para: Used by any Group user to Leave the Group. Last remaining Group Admin must be the last to leave a group.

parameterdescription.para: - User ID requesting to leave the group
- Group the user is requesting to leave
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &UserIdCancelingRequest, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: CancelRequest

detaileddescription.para: Used by a non-Group user to cancel a request to join a group

parameterdescription.para: - User ID requesting to cancel their request to join
Group the user is canceling their request from
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &UserIdAcceptedIntoGroup, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: AcceptInvite

detaileddescription.para: After calling 'InviteUser', the user invited uses this method to accept the group invite request

parameterdescription.para: - User ID accepting the invite
- Group the user is accepting the invite from
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &UserIdToDecline, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: DeclineInvite

detaileddescription.para: After calling 'InviteUser', the user uses this method to decline an group invite request

parameterdescription.para: - User ID declining the invite
- Group the user is declining the invite from
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &RequestingUserId, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const FAccelByteModelsGetGroupMembersListByGroupIdRequest &RequestedContent, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: QueryGroupRoster

detaileddescription.para: Retrieves a complete list of members in the group

parameterdescription.para: - User ID requesting the list of members
- Group the user wants the list of members from
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

detaileddescription.para: After calling 'QueryGroupRoster' this method can be used to retrieve the list of cached group members requested

simplesect.para: FAccelByteModelsGetGroupMemberListResponse - Complete list of group members queried from 'QueryGroupRoster'

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FAccelByteModelsGroupMember > &GroupRoster)
memberdef.name: GetCachedUserMembership

detaileddescription.para: Used to get a list of cached group members from the 'CurrentGroup'

parameterdescription.para: - Out parameter of the list of members in 'CurrentGroup'

detaileddescription.para: After calling 'QueryGroupInvites' this method can be used to retrieve the list of cached group invites requested

simplesect.para: FAccelByteModelsGetMemberRequestsListResponse - Complete list of group invites queried from 'QueryGroupInvites'

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &AdminUserId, const FString &UserIdToCancel, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: CancelInvite

detaileddescription.para: Used to cancel an invite sent to a user

parameterdescription.para: - Must be a group Admin with permissions to delete invites
- User ID used to find the invite in which to cancel
- Group to cancel the invite from
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

memberdef.argsstring: (const int32 &GroupAdmin, const FUniqueNetId &AdminUserId, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const FAccelByteModelsGroupUpdatable &RequestContent, const bool CompletelyReplace, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: UpdateGroupInfo

detaileddescription.para: Updates specific group data contained in 'FAccelByteModelsGroupUpdatable' on the server

parameterdescription.para: - Required local Admin user number to perform this action
- Required Admin with permissions to update group information
- Group that will be receiving the updated information
- Content to change in the group information
- True, will overwrite all data to the incoming data. False, will overwrite only the filled data.
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

memberdef.argsstring: (const int32 AdminLocalUserNum, const FUniqueNetId &UserIdToAccept, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: AcceptUser

detaileddescription.para: After non-Member user calls "JoinGroup", this method can be used to accept their join request

parameterdescription.para: - Local Admin user number accepting the request
- User ID to accept into the group
- Group the user is joining
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

memberdef.argsstring: (const int32 AdminLocalUserNum, const FUniqueNetId &UserIdToDecline, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: DeclineUser

detaileddescription.para: After non-Member user calls "JoinGroup", this method can be used to decline their join request

parameterdescription.para: - Local Admin user number declining the request
- User ID to decline into the group
- Group the user is being declined from
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &InviterUserId, const FUniqueNetId &InvitedUserId, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: InviteUser

detaileddescription.para: Used to send an invite to a non-Member user to join the group

parameterdescription.para: - Group Member with permission to invite another user into the group
- Non-Member user receiving the invitation
- Group the invite is coming from
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

memberdef.argsstring: (const int32 AdminLocalUserNum, const FUniqueNetId &MemberUserIdToKick, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: RemoveUser

detaileddescription.para: Used to remove/kick a Member or Admin from the group

parameterdescription.para: - Local Admin user number with permissions to remove a user
- User ID to kick/remove from the group
- Group to kick the user from
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

memberdef.argsstring: (const int32 AdminLocalUserNum, const FUniqueNetId &MemberUserIdToPromote, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const FString &MemberRoleId, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: PromoteUser

detaileddescription.para: Used to promote a group Member to a group Admin

parameterdescription.para: - Local Admin user number with permissions to promote a user
- User ID to promote
- Group to promote the user in
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

memberdef.argsstring: (const int32 AdminLocalUserNum, const FUniqueNetId &MemberUserIdToDemote, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const FString &MemberRoleId, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: DemoteUser

detaileddescription.para: Used to demote a group Member to a group Admin

parameterdescription.para: - Local Admin user number with permissions to demote a user
- User ID to demote
- Group to demote the user in
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &ContextUserId, const FAccelByteModelsLimitOffsetRequest &AccelByteModelsLimitOffsetRequest, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: QueryGroupInvites

detaileddescription.para: Used by a non-Member user to get all their group invites

parameterdescription.para: - User ID requesting the query
- Requested content of the query
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

detaileddescription.para: After calling 'QueryGroupInvites' this method can be used to retrieve the list of cached group invites requested

simplesect.para: FAccelByteModelsGetMemberRequestsListResponse - List of all invites sent to a given user requested from 'QueryGroupInvites'

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &ContextUserId, const FAccelByteModelsLimitOffsetRequest &AccelByteModelsLimitOffsetRequest, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: QueryGroupRequests

detaileddescription.para: Used by a Member user to get all their group requests sent out to other non-Member users

parameterdescription.para: - User ID requesting the query
- Requested content of the query
- Group to retrieve the requests from
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

detaileddescription.para: After calling 'QueryGroupRequests' this method can be used to retrieve the list of cached group requests requested

parameterdescription.para: - List of all requests sent by the given group after calling 'QueryGroupRequests'

detaileddescription.para: Used to get the maximum allowed user population of the local 'CurrentGroup' cache

memberdef.argsstring: (const int32 AdminLocalUserNum, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: DeleteGroup

detaileddescription.para: Used to Delete the local and server instance of a given group

parameterdescription.para: - Admin group member with permission to delete a group
- Group information to delete
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

memberdef.argsstring: () const override
memberdef.name: GetNamespace

detaileddescription.para: Used to get the current Namespace

memberdef.argsstring: (const int32 &AdminLocalUserNum, const FUniqueNetId &InAdminUserId, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const FAccelByteModelsUpdateGroupCustomAttributesRequest &RequestContent, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: UpdateGroupCustomAttributes

detaileddescription.para: Used to update a groups FAccelByteModelsGroupInformation data

parameterdescription.para: - Local Admin number requesting to change group data
- Admin ID with permissions to change group data
- Group in which to change information
- Requested group information to change
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

memberdef.argsstring: (const int32 &AdminLocalUserNum, const FUniqueNetId &InAdminUserId, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const FAccelByteModelsUpdateCustomRulesRequest &RequestContent, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: UpdateGroupCustomRule

detaileddescription.para: Used to CREATE or UPDATE a custom rule. Custom Rules are not enforced by AccelByte.

parameterdescription.para: - Local Admin number requesting to update a group custom rule
- Admin ID with permissions to change custom rules
- Group receiving the custom rule
- Custom rule data to add or update
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

memberdef.argsstring: (const int32 &AdminLocalUserNum, const FUniqueNetId &AdminUserId, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const EAccelByteAllowedAction &InAllowedAction, const FAccelByteModelsUpdateGroupPredefinedRuleRequest &RequestContent, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: UpdatePredefinedRule

detaileddescription.para: Used to CREATE or UPDATE a predefined rule.

parameterdescription.para: - Local Admin number requesting to update a group predefined rule
- Admin ID with permissions to change predefined rules
- Group to create or update the predefined rule from
- Allowed action to update in the predefined rule
- Content to create or update in the predefined rule
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

memberdef.argsstring: (const int32 &AdminLocalUserNum, const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo, const EAccelByteAllowedAction &AllowedAction, const FOnGroupsRequestCompleted &OnCompleted)
memberdef.name: DeletePredefinedRule

detaileddescription.para: Used to DELETE a predefined rule.

parameterdescription.para: - Local Admin number requesting to delete a group predefined rule
- Group to delete the predefined rule from
- Allowed action to delete
- Return delegate indicating the success of this method

memberdef.argsstring: () const
memberdef.name: IsGroupValid

detaileddescription.para: Ensures that local group data is not null

simplesect.para: boolean that is true group data is not null

memberdef.argsstring: (const FAccelByteGroupsInfo &InGroupInfo)
memberdef.name: VerifyGroupInfo

detaileddescription.para: Ensures that the incoming group data is valid and ready to be used

parameterdescription.para: - Group data to be verified

simplesect.para: boolean that is true if group data is valid

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsGetGroupListResponse &AccelByteModelsGetGroupListResponse)
memberdef.name: SetCachedGroupResults

detaileddescription.para: Sets cached group data after a query of group information

parameterdescription.para: - Sets the local copy of CachedGroupResults

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsGetGroupListResponse &AccelByteModelsGetGroupListResponse)
memberdef.name: SetCachedGroupListByGroupIdsResults

detaileddescription.para: Sets cached group data after a query of group information

parameterdescription.para: - Sets the local copy of CachedGroupListByGroupIdsResults

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsGetGroupMemberListResponse &AccelByteModelsGetGroupMemberListResponse)
memberdef.name: SetCachedMembersByGroupIdResults

detaileddescription.para: Sets cached group data after a query of group information

parameterdescription.para: - Sets the local copy of CachedMembersByGroupIdResults

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsGetMemberRequestsListResponse &AccelByteModelsGetMemberRequestsListResponse)
memberdef.name: SetCachedGroupInviteResults

detaileddescription.para: Sets cached group data after a query of group information

parameterdescription.para: - Sets the local copy of CachedGroupInviteResults

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsGetMemberRequestsListResponse &AccelByteModelsGetMemberRequestsListResponse)
memberdef.name: SetCachedGroupRequests

detaileddescription.para: Sets cached group data after a query of group information

parameterdescription.para: - Sets the local copy of CachedGroupRequests

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &RoleId, const FString &UserId)
memberdef.name: AddCachedGroupMember

detaileddescription.para: Adds a group member to the cached data

parameterdescription.para: - Role of the new member
- User Id of the new member

memberdef.argsstring: (FString &UserId)
memberdef.name: RemoveCachedMember

detaileddescription.para: Removes a group member from the cached data

parameterdescription.para: - User Id of the member to be removed

memberdef.argsstring: (FString &UserId, TArray< FString > &NewMemberRoleIds)
memberdef.name: PromoteCachedMember

detaileddescription.para: Promotes a group member inside the cached data

parameterdescription.para: - User Id of the member to be promoted
- New role id for the newly promoted member

memberdef.argsstring: (FString &UserIdToRemove)
memberdef.name: RemoveCachedInvites

detaileddescription.para: Removes a group invite from the cached data

parameterdescription.para: - User Id of the invite to be removed

memberdef.argsstring: (FString &UserIdToRemove)
memberdef.name: RemoveCachedRequests

detaileddescription.para: Removes a group request from the cached data

parameterdescription.para: - User Id of the request to be removed

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelByteAllowedAction &AllowedAction)
memberdef.name: RemoveCachedPredefinedRule

detaileddescription.para: Removes a group predefined rule from the cached data

parameterdescription.para: - Allowed action of the predefined rule to be removed

detaileddescription.para: Hidden default constructor, the constructor that takes in a subsystem instance should be used instead.
AccelByte service implementation of the Groups Interface
